sys_atf_suite.name: ITSMMT-216 AI Summary Generation Suite
sys_atf_suite.description: ATF tests for AI summary generation — covers Now Assist invocation, fallback, and work notes attachment.

sys_atf_test.name: ITSMMT-216-T001: Summary Attached to Incident Work Notes
sys_atf_test.description: Assert that AI summary is appended to incident work_notes after invocation.

sys_atf_test.name: ITSMMT-216-T002: Fallback Summary on Now Assist Failure
sys_atf_test.description: Assert that fallback summary is written when Now Assist is unavailable, without throwing an unhandled error.
